CVE-2026-34078.title: Flatpak is a Linux application sandboxing and distribution framew ...
CVE-2026-34078.description: Flatpak is a Linux application sandboxing and distribution framework. Prior to 1.16.4, the Flatpak portal accepts paths in the sandbox-expose options which can be app-controlled symlinks pointing at arbitrary paths. Flatpak run mounts the resolved host path in the sandbox. This gives apps access to all host files and can be used as a primitive to gain code execution in the host context. This vulnerability is fixed in 1.16.4.

CVE-2026-34079.title: Flatpak is a Linux application sandboxing and distribution framew ...
CVE-2026-34079.description: Flatpak is a Linux application sandboxing and distribution framework. Prior to 1.16.4, the caching for ld.so removes outdated cache files without properly checking that the app controlled path to the outdated cache is in the cache directory. This allows Flatpak apps  to delete arbitrary files on the host. This vulnerability is fixed in 1.16.4.
